metadata.title: Why Position and Momentum Cannot Commute — and Why That's Everything
metadata.note: Clean build. Distinguishes operator action from measurement sequence; fixes order/sign: [x,p]=i hbar and [p,x]=-i hbar; scopes uncertainty claim.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file

beats.label: This is Liam, in for Bear. Ordinary numbers commute: x p equals p x. Quantum position and momentum d

beats.prompt: Position is the multiplication operator: x hat acting on psi gives x times psi.
beats.label: Position is the multiplication operator: x hat acting on psi gives x times psi.

beats.prompt: Momentum in the position representation is a derivative: p hat equals minus i h bar times d by d x.
beats.label: Momentum in the position representation is a derivative: p hat equals minus i h bar times d by d x.

beats.prompt: First apply momentum, then position. The result is minus i h bar x times psi prime.
beats.label: First apply momentum, then position. The result is minus i h bar x times psi prime.

beats.prompt: Now reverse the operators: momentum acts on x psi. Differentiation sees both factors, so the product rule gives psi plus x psi prime.
beats.label: Now reverse the operators: momentum acts on x psi. Differentiation sees both factors, so the product

beats.prompt: Subtract in the order x p minus p x. The x psi prime terms cancel, leaving positive i h bar times psi.
beats.label: Subtract in the order x p minus p x. The x psi prime terms cancel, leaving positive i h bar times ps

beats.prompt: Because this holds for every suitable wave function, the operator identity is x hat p hat minus p hat x hat equals i h bar times the identity.
beats.label: Because this holds for every suitable wave function, the operator identity is x hat p hat minus p ha

beats.prompt: Reverse the commutator and the sign reverses: p x minus x p equals minus i h bar. Order is the entire point.
beats.label: Reverse the commutator and the sign reverses: p x minus x p equals minus i h bar. Order is the entir

beats.prompt: This algebra is not literally position measurement followed by momentum measurement. It compares two compositions of mathematical operators acting on the same s
beats.label: This algebra is not literally position measurement followed by momentum measurement. It compares two

beats.prompt: The Robertson relation turns a nonzero commutator into a spread bound. For position and momentum, delta x times delta p is at least h bar over two.
beats.label: The Robertson relation turns a nonzero commutator into a spread bound. For position and momentum, de

beats.label: The bound describes the spreads of a prepared state. It does not require a photon kick, and it does

beats.prompt: One derivative product rule creates the remainder. That remainder encodes the canonical geometry linking position, momentum, and their uncertainty bound.

Your turn. Compute p x minus x p acting on psi, and predict the sign before doing any algebra.
Multiplication and differentiation miss commuting by exactly i h bar.
